summary: A social media application centered on sharing images and interacting via likes and comments. The architecture uses independent concepts for content (Posting), relationships (Following), interactions (Commenting, Upvoting), and media (FileUploading), glued together via synchronizations to form the user experience.

entities.name: User
entities.description: Represents a registered individual. Managed by `Authentication` (credentials) and `Sessioning` (active state).

entities.name: Post
entities.description: A piece of content created by a user. Managed by `Posting`. Contains a caption and a reference to media.

entities.name: Follow
entities.description: A directed relationship between two users. Managed by `Following`.

entities.name: Comment
entities.description: Textual response to an item. Managed by `Commenting`. Polymorphic target (can be a Post).

entities.name: Vote
entities.description: Binary approval of an item. Managed by `Upvoting` (or `Liking`).

entities.name: File
entities.description: An uploaded media asset. Managed by `FileUploading`.

user_flows.name: Create Post
steps: System confirms upload and returns a `file_id`.
System creates a Post in `Posting` linked to the file.

user_flows.name: Interact with Post
steps: User clicks 'Like'. System records vote in `Upvoting`.
User submits a comment. System records comment in `Commenting`.

user_flows.name: View Feed
steps: System identifies users followed by the current user (`Following`).
System retrieves posts authored by those users (`Posting`).
System aggregates like counts (`Upvoting`) and comments (`Commenting`) for each post.

pages.name: Feed / Home
pages.description: Main landing page showing a stream of content.
queries: Get followed users for current user
Get posts by list of authors
Get like counts for displayed posts
Get recent comments for displayed posts

pages.name: Profile
pages.description: Displays user specific grid of posts and stats.

pages.name: Post Detail
pages.description: Focused view of a single piece of content.
queries: Get like status for current user

pages.name: Upload
pages.description: Interface to select media and write captions.

technical_requirements: Synchronization: Link `FileUploading` success to `Posting` creation or ensure post metadata includes file references.
Synchronization: Ensure only logged-in users (checked via `Sessioning`) can create posts, comments, or likes.
